TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Bsuring == u sulit nu Hulam: ÁßÄśěóťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Bsuring. u kasalumaluma' nu Bsuring sa, 321 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,054 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,008 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 46 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Taluku(Truku) 82%, Tayan(Tayal) 3%, Pangcah(Amis) 3%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Seediq 1%, zumazuma 5%.. u niyazu' nu Taluku(Truku) u Taluku(Truku) a niyazu; kuyni, katuud ku Taluku(Truku) a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa, u Pangcah(Amis) u Yuwatan(Bunun) atu Seediq. u Sakizaya a tademaw izawtu ku Sakizaya itini, caayka tuud. nanusikawaw itini sa , sisa muengentu itini. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 9 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 12 a bulad pulung sausi (565,561), Pangcah (211,031), Tayan (90,884), Paywan (101,472), Yuwatan (58,894), Rukay (13,392), Puyuma (14,340), Cou (6,667), Saysiat (6,662), Yami (4,629), Saw (799), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,826), Sakizaya (958), Sejek (10,193), Laaluwa (404), Kanakanabu (343), zuma (11,585)
S.PHON: == bsuriŇč == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu bsuriŇč. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu bsuriŇč sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, tar~…ĺuku(truku) **%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, s…ô…ôdi* *%, zumazuma *%.. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu tar~…ĺuku(truku) u tar~…ĺuku(truku) a nijazu; kujni, katuud ku tar~…ĺuku(truku) a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa, u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) u juwatan(bunun) atu s…ô…ôdi*. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izawtu ku sakizaja itini, ¶aajka tuud. nanusikawaw itini sa , sisa mu…ôŇč…ôntu itini. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Bsuring == u sulit nu Hulam: ÁßÄśěóťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Bsuring. u kasalumaluma' nu Bsuring sa, 321 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,054 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,008 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 46 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Taluku(Truku) 82%, Tayan(Tayal) 3%, Pangcah(Amis) 3%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Seediq 1%, zumazuma 5%.. u niyazu' nu Taluku(Truku) u Taluku(Truku) a niyazu; kuyni, katuud ku Taluku(Truku) a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa, u Pangcah(Amis) u Yuwatan(Bunun) atu Seediq. u Sakizaya a tademaw izawtu ku Sakizaya itini, caayka tuud. nanusikawaw itini sa , sisa muengentu itini. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 9 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 12 a bulad pulung sausi (565,561), Pangcah (211,031), Tayan (90,884), Paywan (101,472), Yuwatan (58,894), Rukay (13,392), Puyuma (14,340), Cou (6,667), Saysiat (6,662), Yami (4,629), Saw (799), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,826), Sakizaya (958), Sejek (10,193), Laaluwa (404), Kanakanabu (343), zuma (11,585)
S.PHON: == bsuriŇč == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu bsuriŇč. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu bsuriŇč sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, tar~…ĺuku(truku) **%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, s…ô…ôdi* *%, zumazuma *%.. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu tar~…ĺuku(truku) u tar~…ĺuku(truku) a nijazu; kujni, katuud ku tar~…ĺuku(truku) a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa, u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) u juwatan(bunun) atu s…ô…ôdi*. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izawtu ku sakizaja itini, ¶aajka tuud. nanusikawaw itini sa , sisa mu…ôŇč…ôntu itini. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
